project_type: Flutter mobile/desktop app with Riverpod state management
build_system: Flutter SDK with pubspec.yaml, flutter pub get / flutter build
build_command: cd frontend && flutter pub get && flutter analyze
verification_instructions: Run flutter analyze to check for static analysis errors, then flutter test for unit tests
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Flutter SDK available. No device for running app but can do static analysis.
contribution_requirements: Never work on main branch. Strict null safety. No dynamic types. Separate UI from business logic. Services handle all API calls. Clean architecture: core/constants, core/utils, data/services, presentation/screens.
key_patterns: Services use static methods or singletons (see ConnectivityService). FlutterSecureStorage used for caching secure data. Google Fonts (DM Sans body, DM Serif Display headings). AppColors for all colors (persian = #CC5801). AppSizes for spacing/radii. ConsumerStatefulWidget for Riverpod screens.
directory_structure: frontend/lib/core/utils/ - utility services. frontend/lib/core/constants/ - app-wide constants. frontend/lib/presentation/screens/settings/ - settings screens. frontend/lib/presentation/screens/auth/ - auth flow screens. frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/common/ - shared widgets.
